suites.label: Ancestry system: stat grants, heritage selection, ancestry feat availability for all six core ancestries
checks: Dwarf ancestry grants +2 CON, +2 WIS, -2 CHA, 10 HP, Speed 20, Darkvision
Elf ancestry grants +2 DEX, +2 INT, -2 CON, 6 HP, Speed 30, Low-light vision
Gnome ancestry grants +2 CON, +2 CHA, -2 STR, 8 HP, Speed 25, Low-light vision
Goblin ancestry grants +2 DEX, +2 CHA, -2 WIS, 6 HP, Speed 25, Darkvision
Halfling ancestry grants +2 DEX, +2 WIS, -2 STR, 6 HP, Speed 25, Keen Eyes
Human ancestry grants +2 to two free ability scores, 8 HP, Speed 25, no vision special
Character creation with dwarf ancestry makes dwarf heritages available (Forge, Rock, etc.)
Character creation with elf ancestry makes elf heritages available (Arctic, Cavern, etc.)
Ancestry feat list for goblin at level 1 includes Burn It! and Goblin Scuttle
Ancestry feat list for halfling at level 1 includes Halfling Luck and Sure Feet
Selecting an ancestry that does not exist returns a validation error
Ancestry HP stacks with class HP at level 1 (e.g., Dwarf Fighter = 10 ancestry + 10 class = 20)
Ancestry ability boosts/flaws are applied before free ability boosts in character creation
Human bonus ancestry feat at level 1 is available immediately after ancestry selection
